prompt: Generate a stylized art of a cat
prompt_refined: Generate a stylized artwork depicting a cat. The cat should be presented as a high-contrast black silhouette against a plain white background, drawing visual inspiration from the minimalist style and composition of image 1. Place the stylized cat centrally, similar to the dominant form in image 1, with a defined black ground line at the bottom.
objects: Centrally placed stylized black silhouette cat
Defined black ground line at the bottom
